modules.name: eth_typeshed.orbiter
documentation:
Orbiter has a unique technique for bridging.  An account can transfer
funds directly to the Orbiter address for the asset, and the trailing
4 digits of the transaction is used to identify the target network.

For example, transferring 100009001 ETH to 0x80c67432656d59144ceff962e8faf8926599bcf8
on any supported chain will bridge the funds (minus a fee) to Mainnet.

methods.name: eth_typeshed.erc20.erc20.ERC20.get_allowance_slot
documentation: Gets the allowance slot given token/owner/spender combination

methods.name: eth_typeshed.erc20.erc20.ERC20.get_balance_slot
documentation:
Attempts to find the balance slot for an address.
This will not work on tokens with irregular balance calculation.
